title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Syncing the Scrolls
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just synced the latest API documentation. Keeping the scrolls fresh and accurate for all your building needs!
gist.summary: Automated synchronization of APIDOCS.md to reflect the latest OpenAPI spec changes following a production deployment.
gist.impact: Developers referencing the API documentation will see the most up-to-date endpoints and parameters.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old documentation pages while the Bee mascot (Polly) prints out fresh new scrolls from a retro terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, printing fresh documentation scrolls from a retro terminal glowing lime green (#ecf874). Nearby, the round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old papers with a 'NOMNOM' speech bubble. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
